task: MidpointX UI Tweaks (Clear Chat & Resizable Panel)
patterns: Implemented a centralized clearChat method in App.jsx to reset messages and trace state.
Mapped clearChat to both a dedicated 'New Chat' Plus button in the Chat header and double-clicking the active Sidebar tab for seamless UX.
Utilized a custom CSS .resizer div combined with React mouse events (onMouseDown, mousemove, mouseup) to create an adjustable right-side trace panel without requiring external libraries.
